message:
✨ Search history, clear on sidebar click, scope EPG to favorites (#79)

- Clear search bar when any sidebar item is clicked (collapsed icons, tree sections, tree items, keyboard nav)
- Search history: stores last 20 searches in SharedPreferences, shown as autocomplete dropdown with delete option
- Save search to history on Enter or when clearing a non-empty query
- Scope EPG now-playing queries to favorites + failover alternatives only (not all 8K+ channels)
- Scope EPG mapping screen to favorites + failover alts
- Fix sidebar overflow during expand animation (clipBehavior: Clip.hardEdge)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
